transcript.text:
(At "bhc Chicken", the gold standard of chicken)
MAGICKLE?
(Introducing a formidable contender) Whoa, my goodness
(Introducing a formidable contender) Here's your chicken
(The new menu item of "bhc Chicken", MAGICKLE) As soon as it came out, the smell was out of this world
(Behold the magic of garlic, butter and flakes...!)
It's insane
(Introducing the new epic hit menu item) This is gonna go viral
(of "bhc Chicken") Everybody can enjoy this
Hello, everyone
Today,
(Today's mukbang - "bhc Chicken") I'm at "bhc Chicken"!
"bhc Chicken" has always been a favorite of mine
(News of an incredible new menu item...?) We heard they released a new menu item, so we've come with huge expectations
(The name is MAGICKLE...?) Word around town is that it's an epic chicken flavor called "MAGICKLE"
(We have peak expectations) I can't wait to dive in

("bhc Chicken", Seokchon branch)
This is the new menu item
MAGICKLE?
We've invited Tzuyang today in light of releasing
the new flavor,
(Awkward smile) (awkward) MAGICKLE...
(Wingman steps in) MAGICKLE SAUCE made with garlic and butter,
and the MAGICKLE FLAKE goes on top
These flakes were made with a technique we specially developed
We stir-fry minced garlic and breadcrumbs in a direct-fired pot to evaporate moisture
This is how the MAGICKLE gets its crunchy texture
(See how it's done?) That's how you do it
Ooh, does it taste good?
(Even the employees enjoyed MAGICKLE) It's really good, seriously
So, is MAGICKLE
an abbreviation? G-garlic...?

It's garlic, butter, flakes
(Together - Ma.Beop.Keul*) Oh, garlic, butter, flakes *Korean name of MAGICKLE
(She's eating everything she's ordering) Then can I get one MAGICKLE (Original), two MAGICKLE BONELESS,
- and one MAGICKLE COMBO each? - Yes, right away
Oh!
For the sides,
I want one GLASS NOODLE ROSE TTEOKBOKKI
(2 CHEESE BALLS) And you gotta have CHEESE BALL at "bhc Chicken"
For the sauce...
(Sauces will be charged separately!) could you just give me some of each?
(Sauces will be charged separately!) Yes, I'll do that
(It's here already) Wow, my goodness
(It's here already) Here's your chicken
This is just one MAGICKLE?
Wow, so this
is the new menu item

(We finally witness the MAGICKLE!) As soon as it came out, the smell was out of this world
There are tons of flakes
smothering the fried chicken
(A snowfield of MAGICKLE FLAKE in summer) It's like a mountain of flakes
(The garlic & butter aroma is super appetizing) The garlic and butter aroma is so intense
(Let's go) I'm just gonna dig into this thing
Oh, here's the drumstick
I'll try the drumstick
Bon appetit!
(Eyes snap open)
Oh? It's...
This doesn't taste like what I expected!
It's way tastier than what I imagined!
Wow, this is super good
So yummy
It's a combo of sweet and salty

(The garlic and butter flavors burst out with every bite) The strong garlic and butter aroma harmonizes so well
(And the crunchy texture!) The flakes on the outside are really crispy
Drumette! Drumette this time
The texture of the MAGICKLE FLAKE,
(Mad crispy!) it's super crispy and crunchy
Wow, this is absolutely
totally up my alley
It's a completely new flavor
(New sweet and salty crispy chicken that appeals to all) Everyone will like this
(Agreed!)
It's very sweet and salty,
crispy, and addictive
(Smitten by MAGICKLE) I think I'll crave this again soon
Now for the MAGICKLE BONELESS!
Oh...
They used thigh meat for this!

(Happy) It's so tasty since they used thigh meat
Should I try just the MAGICKLE FLAKE?
(Armed with a spoon) A spoon
The MAGICKLE FLAKE is seriously delicious
It's sweet and salty
with a kick of savory flavor mixed in
(This... I could eat for days!) The nuttiness is what makes me eat this non-stop
I always order COMBO when I eat fried chicken
but aside from the regular wings and legs COMBO,
(ex) 1 chicken, DRUMSTICKS, WINGS, COMBO, BONELESS) there's DRUMSTICKS which only gives you drumsticks
(MAGICKLE can be enjoyed in 5 ways) WINGS only gives you wings,
and a lot of variations
(Sauces can be purchased separately)
(Sweet guy) Thank you
How did everything taste today?
Honestly

it's really delicious, like...
The MAGICKLE FLAKE tastes really good!
(The MAGICKLE FLAKE is dehydrated for extra crispiness) You can feel the crispy crunch texture of the garlic and breadcrumbs
so I think that adds to the enjoyment when you eat it
You're just how you look in videos
(He relates to her) As you can see, I hardly ever gain weight
You have a similar body type to me
yet you became
(A role model of the skinny community) such an amazing influencer
(You can do it, too!)
(Really...?)
The BONELESS is so good because it's thigh meat
The thigh meat inside is super tender
and a little juicy!
(Tender leg meat bursting with juice!) You can see the juice seeping out
Under the MAGICKLE FLAKE,

there's the MAGICKLE SAUCE
I can really taste the MAGICKLE SAUCE
(The power of sweet, savory MAGICKLE SAUCE!) Not only the flavor of flakes but the flavor of the sauce is also prominent
As you can see,
(The secret to the sweetness, grain syrup) there's grain syrup applied to the chicken
Then with the garlic and butter,
it creates a sweet and savory taste
Also, the MAGICKLE FLAKE
is made by slowly frying garlic and breadcrumbs in a direct-heated pot
so the aroma is amazing,
and it's incredibly crunchy
(The next big thing) This is gonna go viral
(Sweet, salty, crunchy, perfect for chicken and cola or beer!) Chicken and cola is a must
So, how many "bhc Chicken" branches
do you have nationwide?
The number's gradually changing,

(A whopping 2000 branches nationwide?!) but we have more than 2000 now...
Over 2000 branches...
That's like every small town has a bhc chicken!!
(Come to think of it, there's one near Grandma's place...) My grandmother lives in a really remote area
but there's a "bhc Chicken" there too
- Yeonpyeong Island? - Even at Yeonpyeong Island?!
(That's "bhc Chicken" class) Wow, that's incredible
It's still good after it's gone cold
Back in the day,
(We constantly warred over drumsticks back then) there was no COMBO and only the ORIGINAL chicken,
so we always fought over the drumsticks
Now we have achieved world peace...!
Drumsticks are the best part of chicken
When I was younger,
fried chicken was a really special treat
If my family had chicken without me,

(Weird reason to run away, but OK...) I ran away from home
But, look
The COMBO has
5 drumsticks this big
(5 drumsticks, wings, drumettes packed in the combo) plus the wings and drumettes make this a huge portion
This is the ORIGINAL chicken
(Each piece is huge at "bhc Chicken") Even the whole chicken has huge pieces
Is the chicken just big? It's huge
It's insane...!
This is why selling a whole chicken is the standard
The ribs are pretty good too
The meat on the rib bones
are juicy!
I thought
if it's garlic flavored, it might not appeal to some people
But the garlic flavor isn't so sharp

(Appealing to anyone!) It's something enjoyable for every age and gender
It's good when it's cold, too!
I thought it was chicken breast!
(What a goof) But it was actually chicken breast
Drumsticks were my fave when I was young
(I'm becoming more like Mom...) But now that I'm older, I prefer the wings
Drumstick!
(The last stage, BONELESS) Only on BONELESS piece is left
BONELESS is the easiest to eat,
(Why not take the easy way?) so I do love BONELESS the best
Pow!
The garlic flavor
is savory and sweet
(I mean, Koreans love garlic anyway) But I don't think anyone in our country hates garlic, right?
(She's a peculiar one, alright)
How do you eat so well?

(Were you born like that...?) Did you always eat so well?
I was a big eater since I was young!
Amazing!
(Sauces can be purchased separately) The SWEET HABANERO SAUCE
BBURING BBURING SAUCE
MABSOSA SAUCE, this is crazy spicy
It's really spicy
(My savior!) Oh, thank you!
Since you ate it so well,
I think a lot of our customers will order this menu item
(Responsibility x999) Oh, gosh...
(Please...) I do hope so
(8th can of cola) Even the way you drink cola
(Crispy, crunch MAGICKLE goes superbly with cola or beer) It pairs well with cola, right?
(Crispy, crunch MAGICKLE goes superbly with cola or beer) It's even better with beer
You're so beautiful

in real life...!
(I don't know what to say) It's making me nervous
Oh, not at all...
I was slightly worried I'd get sick of it
if I ordered four of the same flavor
but up to the end...
(The peace was too good to be true) Oh, dear... Oof...
Last piece of chicken!
It's a super addictive flavor
I think I'll crave this again soon
(The MAGICKLE FLAKE is ingenious!) The MAGICKLE FLAKE is a stroke of ingenuity
(MAGICKLE CLEAR!)
You actually finished everything
I'm so shocked!
(His eyes show certainty) There's a reason why you're the president of mukbangs
To be honest

after I heard of the new menu item
I couldn't wait to try it since last week
(There's never been such a magical chicken until now!) I never had any chicken like this
It was really addictive, so I think I'll want to eat it again soon
I had a great meal today as well!
